Dear [salutation],

As a community member, I am concerned about Citizens Bank's financial relationships with CoreCivic and The GEO Group (GEO). I will not consider banking with you and will encourage my community, elected leaders, universities, and local organizations to do the same until these relationships end.

Citizens cannot honor its commitment to fostering strong communities while profiting from companies that are instrumental in injustices and treating people inhumanely. The choice is yours: align your actions with your stated values or or continue down a path that will permanently link your brand to harmful detention practices.

[First Name] [Last Name]
[Town], [STATE]
